# Arcana UI

> Auto-generated file. Do not edit manually.
> Source: scripts/generate-docs.mjs | Regenerate: pnpm generate-docs
> Last generated: 2026-04-09T17:22:56.002Z

Arcana UI is a token-driven React design system for AI agents to assemble production-grade web interfaces.

## Install

```bash
npm install @arcana-ui/core @arcana-ui/tokens
```

## Quick Start

```tsx
import '@arcana-ui/tokens/dist/arcana.css'; // Required CSS tokens
import { Button, Card, Input } from '@arcana-ui/core';

// Theme switching (14 presets, no JS runtime — pure CSS)
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'midnight');

// Density switching
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-density', 'compact'); // compact | normal | comfortable
```

## Themes (14)

- **brutalist**: Bloomberg Terminal meets Swiss poster — bold red accent, dramatic typography, thick structural borders
- **commerce**: Clean product-focused design — warm neutrals with green accent, Shopify-inspired
- **corporate**: Conservative navy/slate palette — trustworthy, enterprise-grade, Stripe-inspired
- **dark**: Deep slate dark with vibrant indigo accent — focused, rich, Linear-inspired
- **editorial**: Elegant serif typography, high contrast — publishing, NYT-inspired
- **glass**: Apple iOS glassmorphism — frosted translucent surfaces on gradient, elegant light typography
- **light**: Warm stone palette with indigo accent — clean, precise, Notion-inspired
- **midnight**: Deep navy with soft gold accents — premium, finance-grade, Bloomberg-inspired
- **mono**: Pure black and white — stark typographic minimalism, portfolio/architecture-inspired
- **nature**: Earth tones with warm greens — organic, wellness, sustainability-inspired
- **neon**: Electric neon on dark — vivid cyan/pink accents, cyberpunk, gaming-inspired
- **retro98**: Authentic Windows 98 recreation — pixel-perfect bevels, navy blue title bars, silver surfaces
- **startup**: Vibrant purple-to-pink gradient energy — modern SaaS, Vercel/Linear-inspired
- **terminal**: Premium terminal emulator — green phosphor on black, monospace everything, Warp/Hyper-inspired

## Components (108)


### primitives (12)

- **Button** — props: variant, size, shape
- **Input** — props: label, size, error
- **Textarea** — props: label, error, helperText
- **Select** — props: label, error, helperText
- **Checkbox** — props: label, description, indeterminate
- **CheckboxGroup** — props: options, value, onChange
- **Radio** — props: label, description
- **RadioGroup** — props: name, label, value
- **Toggle** — props: label, description, checked
- **Badge** — props: variant, size, dot
- **Avatar** — props: src, alt, name
- **AvatarGroup** — props: max

### composites (21)

- **Card** — props: variant, padding, interactive
- **CardHeader** — props: title, description, action
- **CardBody**
- **CardFooter** — props: align
- **Modal** — props: open, onClose, title
- **ModalClose** — props: onClick
- **Alert** — props: variant, title, onClose
- **ToastProvider**
- **Tabs** — props: value, onChange, defaultValue
- **TabList**
- **Tab** — props: value, disabled
- **TabPanels**
- **TabPanel** — props: value
- **Accordion** — props: type, defaultValue, value
- **AccordionItem** — props: value, disabled
- **AccordionTrigger**
- **AccordionContent**
- **Banner** — props: variant, title, icon
- **Skeleton** — props: variant, width, height
- **Spinner** — props: size, color, label
- **ErrorBoundary** — props: fallback, onError

- **Stack** — props: direction, gap, align
- **HStack** — props: gap, align, justify
- **Grid** — props: columns, gap, rowGap
- **GridColumn** — props: span, start, as
- **Container** — props: size, prose, padding

- **FooterSection** — props: title
- **FooterLink** — props: external
- **FooterBottom**
- **Hero** — props: headline, subheadline, primaryCTA
- **FeatureSection** — props: title, subtitle, features
- **Testimonial** — props: quote, author, jobTitle
- **PricingCard** — props: name, price, period
- **CTA** — props: headline, description, primaryCTA
- **StatsBar** — props: stats, variant
- **Timeline** — props: items, variant
- **LogoCloud** — props: logos, title, variant
- **DataTable** — props: data, columns, sortable
- **StatCard** — props: value, label, prefix
- **ProgressBar** — props: value, max, variant
- **KPICard** — props: value, label, prefix
- **DatePicker** — props: value, defaultValue, onChange
- **FileUpload** — props: accept, multiple, maxSize
- **Drawer** — props: open, onClose, side
- **Popover** — props: trigger, content, open
- **CommandPalette** — props: open, onClose, items
- **Divider** — props: orientation, variant, label
- **Spacer** — props: size, axis
- **AspectRatio** — props: ratio
- **Image** — props: src, alt, fallback

- **PriceDisplay** — props: value, originalValue, currency
- **RatingStars** — props: value, max, count
- **ArticleLayout** — props: maxWidth, sidebar, sidebarPosition
- **PullQuote** — props: quote, attribution, variant
- **AuthorCard** — props: name, role, avatar
- **RelatedPosts** — props: title, posts, columns
- **NewsletterSignup** — props: title, description, placeholder
- **ScrollArea** — props: maxHeight, orientation, showScrollbar
- **Collapsible** — props: open, defaultOpen, onOpenChange
- **CopyButton** — props: value, label, copiedLabel
- **KeyboardShortcut** — props: keys, variant

- **ThemeProvider** — props: defaultTheme, storageKey, enableTransitions

## Hooks (11)

- **useToast**
- **useMediaQuery**: Reactively matches a CSS media query string. SSR-safe: returns `false` when `window` is unavailable.
- **useBreakpoint**: Returns the current active breakpoint and convenience booleans. SSR-safe: defaults to `"lg"` (desktop) when `window` is 
- **usePrefersReducedMotion**: Returns `true` when the user has enabled "Prefer reduced motion" in their OS or browser settings. SSR-safe: returns `fal
- **useHotkey**: Hook to listen for keyboard shortcuts. Automatically handles Cmd (Mac) vs Ctrl (Windows/Linux) when modifier includes "m
- **useFloating**: Positions a floating element relative to a trigger, with smart flip and viewport clamping. Zero dependencies — a lightwe
- **useClickOutside**: Fires a callback when a click (mousedown) occurs outside of the referenced element. SSR-safe: does nothing when `documen
- **useDrag**: Generic drag interaction hook. Handles mousedown/touchstart → document mousemove/touchmove → mouseup/touchend with optio
- **useUndoRedo**: Generic undo/redo history stack. New pushes after an undo clear the forward (redo) history. Stack size is bounded by `ma
- **useTheme**: Reads the persisted theme from localStorage. Returns `null` if no preference is stored or if running on the server. / fu
- **useThemeContext**: Reads the persisted theme from localStorage. / function getStoredTheme(key: string): ThemeId | null { if (typeof window
